loading.doc: Generic loading placeholder used in lists / panes that haven't received data yet.

busy.doc: Generic in-flight status text shown while a skill call is running.

error.doc: Generic error prefix shown before any API error message, e.g. 'Fout: invalid-mnemonic'.

hero_title.doc: Hero heading on /welcome.html — first thing a brand-new user sees.

hero_intro.text: Een buurt-prikbord dat lokaal op jouw apparaat draait. Geen feed, geen reclame, jouw data blijft van jou.

new_title.doc: Title of the left-hand choice card on /welcome.html — link to /onboard.html.

new_body.text: Ik heb een uitnodigings-link of -code en wil voor het eerst lid worden van een groep.

restore_title.doc: Title of the right-hand choice card on /welcome.html — link to /restore.html.

restore_body.text: Ik heb mijn herstelzin (12 of 24 woorden) van een ander apparaat. Ik wil hem hier opnieuw gebruiken.

footer_hint.text: Geen voorkennis nodig — je doorloopt de stappen in een paar minuten. Je kunt later van apparaat wisselen door je herstelzin opnieuw te gebruiken.
footer_hint.doc: Reassurance footer at the bottom of /welcome.html.

heading.doc: Main page heading on /privacy.html. (Renamed from 'title' 2026-05-07 to match the page-pattern convention.)

intro.text: Stoop is een onderzoeks-preview. Onderstaande punten zijn nooit verstopt; ze gelden voor iedereen die meedoet.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /privacy.html. Sets the 'this is a research preview' framing.

data_location_heading.doc: H3 above the data-location list on /privacy.html: which provider hosts what.

unset_value.doc: Placeholder shown next to a privacy-row label when no value is configured (e.g. no pod attached).

row_relay_operator.doc: Label for the relay operator row in the data-location list.

row_relay_url.doc: Label for the relay server URL row.

row_pod_issuer.doc: Label for the pod provider (Solid OIDC issuer) row.

row_pod_root.doc: Label for the pod root URL row.

intro.text: Stoop werkt out-of-the-box volledig lokaal. Een Solid-pod is optioneel: het maakt je posts en profiel portable tussen apparaten en geeft je controle over de opslag. Je kunt later aan- of afmelden zonder data te verliezen.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /sign-in.html. Contains <strong> tag — keep it.

issuer_label.doc: Label above the issuer URL input. Technical term — no translation strictly required.

submit.doc: Submit button on the sign-in form.

sign_out.doc: Submit button on the sign-out form.

pod_attached.doc: Status word shown when the pod is currently attached. Plugged into signed_in_html via {podLabel}.

pod_not_attached.doc: Status word shown when sign-in succeeded but pod-attach failed. Plugged into signed_in_html via {podLabel}.

signed_in_html.doc: Status line shown when signed in. Contains <strong> tag and two placeholders: {webid} (URL) and {podLabel} (status word from pod_attached / pod_not_attached). Preserve all.

not_signed_in.text: Niet aangemeld bij een pod. Stoop draait lokaal.
not_signed_in.doc: Status line shown when no pod is attached.

signed_out.doc: Confirmation shown after a successful sign-out.

intro.text: Tellers van acties die deze agent in dit proces heeft gezien. In-memory — opnieuw nul bij herstart. Faciliteert beta-runbook § "Operational metrics".
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /metrics.html. Mentions the beta runbook and the in-memory nature of counters.

refresh.doc: Refresh button on /metrics.html — triggers an immediate reload of counters.

empty.text: Nog geen tellers — er is nog niets gebeurd in deze sessie.
empty.doc: Empty-state shown when the metrics map is empty (fresh process, no skill calls yet).

col_event.doc: Header of the first column in the metrics grid. The technical name of the counted event.

col_count.doc: Header of the second column — number of times the event fired.

col_last.doc: Header of the third column — timestamp of the most recent firing.

snapshot_at.doc: Footer line under the metrics grid. {ts} is a locale-formatted timestamp.

errors.peer_required: Kies eerst iemand om te muten.
errors.itemId_required: Kies eerst een post om te rapporteren.

post_form.hide_name_hint: Andere leden zien je handle (@…), niet je echte naam. Niet anoniem voor de server — de relay-operator ziet wel dat jij iets hebt gepost.

pictures_label.doc: Label of the picker on the post-form. Phase 39 — V2.5 picture attachments.

pictures_hint.text: Maximaal 4 foto's; ze worden lokaal kleiner gemaakt (max 1280px) voordat ze worden geplaatst. Andere leden zien een voorbeeld; de volledige foto wordt pas geladen wanneer iemand erop klikt.
pictures_hint.doc: Hint under the picker. Explains the 4-picture cap, the client-side resize, and the on-request loading.

pictures_resizing.doc: Inline status while images are being resized in the browser.

pictures_ready.doc: Inline status after a successful resize. {count} is an integer.

pictures_error.doc: Inline status when one or more images failed to resize. {count} is an integer.

open_picture.doc: ARIA label on a thumbnail in the feed. Triggers the modal that loads the full image.

close.doc: Close button label on the attachment modal.

picture_loading.doc: Modal status text shown while the full bytes are being fetched.

picture_pending.text: Foto wordt opgehaald — kan even duren als de afzender offline is.
picture_pending.doc: Modal status text shown when the requestAttachment skill returned `pending: true`. The fetch continues in the background.

attach_picture.doc: Tooltip on the camera icon next to the chat input. Phase 39 — V2.5 picture attachments. Used as the title attribute on the picker label.

profile.title: Mijn profiel
profile.is_revealed: echte naam zichtbaar voor deze groep

intro.text: Ontvang een melding op dit apparaat als er iets gebeurt — ook als Stoop op de achtergrond staat. Werkt via je browser; je kunt de toestemming altijd intrekken via de browser-instellingen.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /push.html. Explains background-aware notifications + that the user can always revoke from browser settings.

subscribe.doc: Button label to enable push notifications. Triggers Web-Push subscribe + permission prompt.

unsubscribe.doc: Button label to disable push notifications.

test.doc: Button label that fires a self-test push so the user can verify delivery.

unsupported.text: Deze browser ondersteunt geen Web Push.
unsupported.doc: Status line shown when Service Worker / PushManager is missing (older browsers, some embedded WebViews).

no_vapid.text: Push is op deze server uitgeschakeld — vraag de admin om een VAPID-sleutel te configureren.
no_vapid.doc: Status line shown when the relay operator hasn't configured a VAPID key, so push isn't possible.

status_subscribed_html.doc: Status line shown when a push subscription exists. Contains <code> tag and {perm} placeholder (browser Notification.permission value, e.g. 'granted').

status_not_subscribed_html.doc: Status line shown when no push subscription exists yet. Contains <code> tag and {perm} placeholder.

subscribed_ok.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful subscribe.

unsubscribed_ok.doc: Inline confirmation after a successful unsubscribe.

test_sending.doc: Inline status while a test push is in flight.

test_body.doc: Body of the test push notification (visible in the OS notification UI).

test_result.doc: Inline status after the test push. {delivered} and {failed} are integer counts.

intro.text: Een groep starten is geen technische ingreep. Het is een afspraak tussen leden. Beantwoord de zes vragen hieronder; ze worden samen het reglement van de groep, zichtbaar voor iedereen die later lid wordt.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /create-group.html. Frames group creation as a social agreement, not a technical setup. Contains <strong> tag.

q1_name.doc: Field label for the group's display name. Numbered question.

q1_purpose.doc: Field label for the two-sentence purpose statement.

q1_purpose_ph.text: bv. Buurtgenoten in Groningen-Oosterpoort die elkaar willen helpen met klusjes, lenen en weten wat er speelt.
q1_purpose_ph.doc: Placeholder for the purpose textarea. Example for a Groningen-Oosterpoort buurt.

q2_admins.text: 2. Wie is admin? (WebID's, één per regel)
q2_admins.doc: Field label for the admins-list textarea.

q2_admins_hint.text: We raden minstens twee admins aan.
q2_admins_hint.doc: Hint under the admins textarea recommending two admins.

q3_rules.text: 3. Huisregels — wat hoort er wel/niet bij? (één per regel)
q3_rules.doc: Field label for the house-rules textarea.

q3_rules_ph.text:
Vragen, aanbod, lenen.
Voertaal: Nederlands.
Geen reclame, geen politiek.
q3_rules_ph.doc: Placeholder for the house-rules textarea, multi-line example.

q4_conflict.doc: Field label for the conflict-resolution policy select.

q4_conflict_admin.doc: Conflict policy option: admin makes the call.

q4_conflict_mediation.text: Gesprek tussen betrokkenen, admin als getuige
q4_conflict_mediation.doc: Conflict policy option: mediated conversation, admin observes.

q5_access.doc: Field label for the access-policy select.

q5_invite_only.text: Op uitnodiging — admin geeft QR persoonlijk
q5_invite_only.doc: Access policy option: invite-only via admin-issued QR.

q5_shared_link.text: Via doorgegeven link — leden mogen anderen toevoegen
q5_shared_link.doc: Access policy option: members may forward the invite.

q5_approval.doc: Access policy option: admin approves each join request.

q6_leave.doc: Field label for the leave-policy select.

q6_keep_posts.text: Posts blijven, naam verdwijnt (default — bewaart context)
q6_keep_posts.doc: Leave policy option: posts kept, attribution stripped on leave.

q6_remove_all.text: Alles van die persoon verdwijnt (clean break)
q6_remove_all.doc: Leave policy option: all of the leaving member's content removed.

group_id_label.doc: Field label for the technical group-id input. Lowercase only — used in pod paths.

rotation_legend.doc: Legend of the key-rotation fieldset. Frames rotation as 'keeping the group fresh'.

rotation_intro.text: De groep gebruikt elke X dagen een nieuwe code. Wie de code niet meer krijgt, valt automatisch uit de groep. De code wissel je buiten de app om uit — bv. via WhatsApp, in een briefje, of in persoon. Dat houdt de groep lokaal.
rotation_intro.doc: Hint under the rotation legend. Contains <em> + <strong> tags AND mentions the in-person / out-of-band channel deliberately.

rotation_admin_only_label.text: Alleen admins delen de code uit.
rotation_admin_only_label.doc: Bold label for the admin-only rotation radio.

rotation_admin_only_hint.text: Admins genereren elke X dagen een nieuwe code en geven die persoonlijk door aan leden.
rotation_admin_only_hint.doc: Hint under the admin-only rotation radio.

rotation_peer_label.doc: Bold label for the peer-distributable rotation radio.

rotation_peer_hint.text: Elk lid kan de code aan iemand nieuw geven. Decentraler — admin is geen single point of failure.
rotation_peer_hint.doc: Hint under the peer-distributable rotation radio.

rotation_days_label.doc: Label above the rotation-period number input. Trailing ellipsis is intentional.

saving.doc: Inline status while createGroupV2 is running.

created_msg.doc: Inline success status. {groupId} is the new group's id.

result_heading.doc: Heading of the success card shown after group creation.

result_intro.text: De eerste membership-code is hieronder — geef 'm buiten Stoop om aan de eerste leden:
result_intro.doc: Lead text above the first membership code. Reinforces the out-of-band-distribution rule.

result_expiry.doc: Expiry line under the membership code. {date} is locale-formatted, {days} is the rotation period in days, {mode} is the human-readable rotation mode (see mode_admin_only / mode_peer).

result_footer.text: Je kunt 'm later opnieuw bekijken op de groep-pagina.
result_footer.doc: Footer hint under the result card.

mode_admin_only.text: alleen admins delen de code uit
mode_admin_only.doc: Lower-case description of admin-only rotation, plugged into result_expiry's {mode}.

mode_peer.doc: Lower-case description of peer-distributable rotation, plugged into result_expiry's {mode}.

feed.doc: Top-nav link to the main feed page (/).

my_posts.doc: Top-nav link to /mine.html — the user's own posts.

chat.doc: Top-nav link to /chat.html — peer-to-peer chat threads.

contacts.doc: Top-nav link to /contacts.html — the user's contact book.

metrics.doc: Top-nav link to /metrics.html — diagnostic metrics page.

profile.doc: Top-nav link to /profile.html — user's own profile + handle.

pod.doc: Top-nav link to /sign-in.html — Solid pod sign-in / status.

push.doc: Top-nav link to /push.html — Web-Push subscription management.

onboard.doc: Top-nav link to /onboard.html — admin invite / onboarding tools.

eviction_banner_title.doc: Heading of the orange banner on /group.html shown when one or more members' codes have expired past the grace window.

eviction_banner_intro.text: Voor één of meer leden is de membership-code verlopen — hun posts worden verborgen totdat ze de nieuwe code inwisselen.
eviction_banner_intro.doc: Lead paragraph in the eviction banner. Explains the auto-evict behaviour from Phase 35 (V2.5).

eviction_member_html.doc: Single list item inside the eviction banner. Contains a <strong> tag and two placeholders: {webid} (URL) and {date} (locale-formatted timestamp). Preserve both.

page_title.doc: Browser tab title for /auth-callback.html, the OIDC redirect target page.

busy.text: Bezig met afronden van de OIDC-flow…
busy.doc: Initial status line shown while completePodSignIn is running, before bulk-sync starts.

uploading.text: Bezig met uploaden van je lokale data naar je pod…
uploading.doc: Status line shown when bulk-sync transitions to 'running' (Phase 34, V2.5).

progress.doc: Progress label under the bar. {done} and {total} are integer counts of bulk-sync paths; do not localise the placeholders.

signed_in_html.doc: Success line after sign-in. Contains <strong> + <code> tags AND two placeholders: {webid} (URL) and {podRoot} (URL); preserve both.

synced_summary.doc: Single-line summary shown after a clean bulk-sync finish. {count} is an integer.

sync_partial.text: Aangemeld; sommige data kon nog niet geüpload worden — Stoop probeert het op de achtergrond opnieuw.
sync_partial.doc: Warning line shown when bulk-sync ends with phase 'error'.

back_link.doc: Bottom-of-page link back to /sign-in.html. Trailing arrow is intentional.

intro.text: Stoop bewaart je instellingen op twee plekken: dingen die op dit apparaat horen (zoals hoe vaak je telefoon ververst) blijven lokaal; mijn voorkeuren reizen via je pod mee naar al je apparaten.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph explaining the device/shared split. Contains <em> tags — keep them so the emphasis is preserved.

section_device_title.doc: Section heading for device-scoped settings (V2.5 Phase 33). Stays local to this install.

badge_device.doc: Small badge next to the device-section heading. Single word; should signal 'this device only'.

section_device_hint.text: Deze instellingen horen bij dít apparaat. Op je telefoon en je laptop kunnen ze verschillen.
section_device_hint.doc: Subtitle under the device-section heading. Reassures the user the values can differ across their installs.

section_shared_title.doc: Section heading for shared / pod-portable settings (V2.5 Phase 33). Travels with the user.

badge_shared.doc: Small badge next to the shared-section heading. Should signal 'syncs across devices'.

section_shared_hint.text: Deze voorkeuren horen bij jou — niet bij dit apparaat. Als je inlogt op je pod, reizen ze automatisch mee naar je andere apparaten.
section_shared_hint.doc: Subtitle under the shared-section heading. Tells the user pod-sign-in is what enables cross-device sync.

poll_interval_label.doc: Label for the polling-interval select. Device-scoped.

poll_interval_hint.text: Lager = sneller nieuwe posts zien; hoger = zuiniger met data en accu.
poll_interval_hint.doc: Hint under the polling-interval label. Trade-off summary: faster vs. battery.

poll_2s.doc: Polling option: 2 seconds. The '(live)' annotation marks it as the always-on default.

hop_label.doc: Label for the global hop-relay toggle. Device-scoped because it's a per-machine routing decision.

hop_hint.text: Mag mijn apparaat berichten doorrelay'en voor andere mensen? Standaard uit: dan doet niemand dat via jou. Per-contact-instelling staat op de contacten-pagina.
hop_hint.doc: Hint under the hop-relay toggle. Default-off explanation + cross-link to /contacts.html. Contains <em> tags.

toggle_on.doc: Generic 'on' label next to a toggle. Reused across multiple toggles on /settings.html.

online_window_heading.doc: Sub-heading inside the device section for the mobile-only online-window controls.

online_window_hint.text: Op telefoon (V3): hoe vaak en hoe lang mag mijn agent zich tijdelijk verbinden met de relay? Op desktop genegeerd — daar is de agent altijd online.
online_window_hint.doc: Hint paragraph under the online-window heading. Mobile-only feature description.

online_every_label.doc: Label for the online-window 'every X minutes' field. Device-scoped.

online_every_hint.text: Eens per X minuten verbinden. Leeg = altijd verbonden (V2 desktop default).
online_every_hint.doc: Hint under the window-frequency input. Explains empty-means-always.

online_duration_label.doc: Label for the online-window 'duration in seconds' field. Device-scoped.

online_empty_placeholder.doc: Placeholder text in the online-window number inputs when no value is set. Should signal 'optional / unset'.

broadcastable_label.doc: Label for the broadcastable toggle. Shared-scoped.

broadcastable_hint.text: Mag een onbekend contact mij een skill-match-suggestie sturen die door mijn agent gefilterd wordt? Bij een match krijg je een melding; geen match = stilte.
broadcastable_hint.doc: Hint under the auto-skill-match toggle. Explains the filtering + match-only-notification semantics.

default_share_location_label.text: Standaard locatie delen met nieuwe contacten?
default_share_location_label.doc: Label for the default-share-location toggle. Shared-scoped.

default_share_location_hint.text: Bepaalt of shareLocation default aan staat als je iemand toevoegt. Per-contact altijd handmatig aan/uit te zetten.
default_share_location_hint.doc: Hint under the default-share-location toggle. Contains <code> tag for the field name.

feedback_saving.doc: Inline feedback text shown while a settings save is in flight.

feedback_saved.doc: Inline feedback text shown after a successful settings save.

page_title.doc: Browser tab title + main page heading on /restore.html — the recovery-from-mnemonic flow.

intro.text: Heb je je herstelzin (12 of 24 woorden) van een ander apparaat? Voer hem hieronder in. Daarna logt je app in op je pod en haalt al je oude posts, contacten en instellingen op.
intro.doc: Lead paragraph on /restore.html. Sets expectations: (1) you need a recovery phrase from another device, (2) the app will pull state from your pod after restoring.

step1_heading.doc: Heading of step 1 of /restore.html: the user types their 12-or-24-word BIP-39 phrase.

step1_hint.text: De zin verlaat dit apparaat niet. We checken eerst of hij geldig is.
step1_hint.doc: Reassurance subtext under step 1: phrase is processed locally, validated before any state change.

step1_placeholder.doc: Placeholder inside the textarea where the user types the recovery phrase. 'bv.' is short for 'bijvoorbeeld' (e.g.). Does NOT need to be a real BIP-39 phrase.

step1_button.doc: Submit button on step 1 — runs validateMnemonicPhrase skill.

step1_status_busy.doc: Inline status text shown while the validation skill is running.

step1_status_ok.doc: Inline status text shown after successful mnemonic validation; advances to step 2.

step2_heading.doc: Heading of step 2 of /restore.html: user reviews the derived pubKey and confirms the destructive swap.

step2_body.text: Dit zou je publieke sleutel worden:
step2_body.doc: Lead text in step 2 above the pubKey preview block.

step2_warning.text: ⚠️ Bevestigen overschrijft de huidige identiteit op dit apparaat. Posts / contacten / instellingen die nu lokaal staan worden vervangen zodra Stoop opnieuw start.
step2_warning.doc: Warning box in step 2 — explains the destructive nature of restoring. The 'als Stoop opnieuw start' hint is legacy V2 wording (Phase 31 made this immediate); revisit when re-translating.

step2_confirm.doc: Primary action button in step 2 — triggers restoreFromMnemonic skill with confirm:true.

step2_cancel.doc: Secondary button in step 2 — cancels the restore + returns to step 1.

step2_status_busy.doc: Inline status text while the restore skill is running.

step2_confirm_prompt.text: Weet je het zeker? De huidige identiteit op dit apparaat wordt overschreven.
step2_confirm_prompt.doc: Browser confirm() prompt shown when the user clicks Confirm. Last chance to back out.

step3_heading.doc: Heading of step 3 of /restore.html: success screen. Tells the user the swap completed and they're under the recovered identity.

step3_body.text: De herstelde identiteit is direct actief. Geen herstart nodig.
step3_body.doc: Lead text in step 3. Phase 31 removed the manual restart step.

step3_hint.text: Wil je je oude posts, contacten en instellingen op dit apparaat terughalen? Log in op je pod — dat trekt automatisch alles op. Anders kun je gewoon doorgaan.
step3_hint.doc: Hint paragraph in step 3 explaining the optional pod-sign-in for full state restore.

step3_pod_button.doc: Button in step 3 linking to /sign-in.html for the optional pod sync.

step3_home_button.doc: Secondary button in step 3 linking to / (the buurt-prikbord) for users who don't need pod sync.

nav_back.doc: Back link in the page header — returns to /welcome.html.
